identity.notes: Official Riggs pages identify Café Riggs at 900 F Street NW; no competing location merged.

sources.title: Official allergy instruction

menuSurfaces.title: Current official Café Riggs five-tab menu
menuSurfaces.notes: Parsed every .menu-tabs__item-header and adjacent .menu-tabs__item-content across the five current food tabs. Prices/asterisks stripped; section headings, modifiers/additions, alcohol and beverage-only entries excluded; identical dish names deduplicated.

summary: Identity/location verified. Parsed the five live official food tabs into 82 deduplicated current food products. Direct allergen positives are limited to exact identities in each base item name/core description before optional modifiers; all other products remain unavailable.
coordinatorNotes: Research-only result; no canonical files or ledger edited.
Ingredient Intelligence deferred to coordinator-authorized APPLY.
Direct-positive assertions after excluding optional modifiers: 63; products with at least one direct positive: 46.
